description: A policyholder calls to report a minor car accident (fender bender). This is the First Notice of Loss (FNOL).

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and verify their policy is active.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer and their active auto policy.

nodes.task_description: Gather details about the accident: date, time, location, description of what happened, and information about the other party.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately captures all details of the loss event.

nodes.task_description: Create a new claim file, provide the customer with a claim number, and explain the next steps.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully initiates the claim, provides a claim number, and explains that an adjuster will be in contact.
